calculator.disclaimer: This calculator provides an estimate. Actual costs may vary based on specific unit, floor, and builder terms. GST applicable on under-construction properties only.

areas.title: Mumbai Micro-Markets
areas.subtitle: Discover high-growth corridors backed by infrastructure development and real demand.

about.title: Why Choose Us
about.subtitle: We believe real estate buying in India deserves the same transparency as stock investing.
about.reraOnlyDesc: Every project we list is MahaRERA registered. No exceptions, no 'registration pending' excuses.
about.fullTransparencyDesc: Our all-inclusive pricing shows stamp duty, GST, registration, maintenance — everything. The price you see is the price you pay.
about.onGroundDDDesc: We physically visit every project. Check construction progress, verify builder claims, assess neighbourhood quality.
about.curateVerifyDesc: We shortlist from hundreds of projects. Only RERA-verified, builder-verified, location-verified projects make it to our platform.
about.transparentPricingDesc: All-inclusive cost calculator shows every charge upfront. No hidden costs revealed at booking time.
about.noPressureDesc: No aggressive follow-ups, no fake urgency, no 'only 2 units left' tactics. Take your time, we'll be here.
about.guidedVisitsDesc: When you're ready, we arrange accompanied site visits with objective commentary — not a sales pitch.
about.ourStoryDesc: Founded by real estate professionals tired of the opacity in Indian property buying.

footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: All information is sourced from MahaRERA and builder documentation. Verify independently before investing.
